news.title: Police investigation underway in southeast Atlanta
news.summary: The Atlanta Police Department is investigating a situation in southeast Atlanta.

news.title: Police expand Atlanta Beltline ‘Path Force’ patrols for walking trails, service call response
news.summary: The Atlanta Police Department announced it was adding more officers to its Atlanta Beltline-focused “Path Force” patrols.

news.title: DeKalb County police find woman dead, suspect injured after early morning shooting
news.summary: A woman was found dead from a gunshot wound in DeKalb County, and a suspect was detained nearby, police report. The investigation is ongoing.

news.title: Investigation underway after woman found dead early Sunday at metro Atlanta apartment
news.summary: The DeKalb County Police Department says a woman was found dead around 2 a.m. Sunday.

news.title: Man hospitalized with multiple gunshot wounds in DeKalb County shooting
news.summary: Police in DeKalb County are investigating a late-night shooting that left one man hospitalized with multiple gunshot wounds, according to local reports.

news.title: DeKalb County shooting leaves one injured, police report
news.summary: A person is injured in a DeKalb County shooting, police report non-life-threatening injuries. Details are limited, with updates expected as the story develops.

news.title: DeKalb County police look for 13-year-old boy missing from Lithonia
news.summary: DeKalb County police officers are asking the public for assistance as they look for a missing 13-year-old child who vanished from a Lithonia apartment complex on July 6.

news.title: Teen found dead in Atlanta was wanted in Rome for shooting
news.summary: Atlanta police have identified the teenage victim found dead days after a Fourth of July shooting in southwest Atlanta.

news.title: Pregnant mother, unborn baby killed in DeKalb County ATV crash
news.summary: An ATV accident in DeKalb County killed a 28-year-old pregnant mother and her unborn baby.

news.title: 2 teens accused of murder in Old Fourth Ward shooting
news.summary: Two teenagers face murder charges following a shooting that left one person dead and three others wounded in Atlanta on Friday afternoon, according to police.

news.title: Man and woman wanted for lighting car fire at Riverdale plaza
news.summary: Riverdale police are asking for the public's help to identify a man and a woman who investigators say intentionally set a car on fire at a shopping plaza Thursday afternoon.

news.title: Metro Atlanta man sentenced to 25 years for rape and protective order violation
news.summary: A man convicted of rape and violation of a temporary protective order has found out how long he must stay behind bars.

news.title: 2 teens charged in deadly quadruple shooting; 18-year-old victim identified
news.summary: Atlanta Police announced that they found probable cause to charge the two other teens who were shot.
